patterns.name: JWT Auth Pattern
patterns.description: Standard JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies and refresh tokens

template.approach: bcrypt cost=12 + httpOnly cookies + short-lived access tokens (15min) + long-lived refresh tokens (7d)

patterns.name: React Performance Pattern
patterns.description: Standard approach to fixing slow React page loads

template.approach: Lighthouse audit → identify LCP/CLS issues → next/image for images → dynamic imports for below-fold → code splitting
key_decisions: Use dynamic imports for non-critical components

patterns.name: Multi-Tenant Schema Pattern
patterns.description: Database schema design for multi-tenant SaaS applications

template.approach: Organization → User → Role → Permission hierarchy with RLS, composite indexes on tenant keys
key_decisions: Use Row Level Security (RLS) for tenant isolation
Composite indexes on (org_id, user_id) for query performance
